---

## Overview

> A proprietary web frontend system comprising 9 integrated source modules.

**sync watch** is an advanced web frontend system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Express.js.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Browser Client"] -->|"HTTPS"| B["Frontend"];
    B -->|"Component Render"| C["Interactive UI Layer"];
    C -->|"API"| D["Express.js Server"];
    D --> E[(Database)];

    style A fill:#1a0505,stroke:#ff7b72,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d0a0a,stroke:#ff7b72,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style C fill:#451010,stroke:#ff7b72,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
sync-watch/
  .gitignore
  LICENSE
  README.md
  package-lock.json
  package.json
  server.js
  public/
    index.html
    script.js
    style.css
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `JavaScript` |
| **Project Category** | `Web Frontend` |
| **Total Source Files** | `9` |
| **Frameworks** | `Express.js` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>express</code>  <code>uuid</code>  <code>socket.io</code>
</p>
